overall.description: Gameplay footage from Monster Hunter Wilds showing a hunter traversing a sandy savanna environment during a sandstorm. The character spots a massive flying monster in the distance before continuing toward rocky formations while accompanied by a small feline companion.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert savanna with scattered acacia trees

events.description: activates focus scanner to survey the area for tracks or monsters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through sandy terrain with large weapon shouldered on back

notable_agents.action: feline companion creature running alongside and following the hunter

entered.detail: vast expanse of sandy ground with patches of dry grass and small rocks
flat-topped savanna tree with sparse foliage
tall thin rock formation rising from the desert floor
large rock outcroppings on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The hunter walks through an open desert savanna environment with scattered acacia trees and distant rock formations. A small feline companion follows closely behind. At around 9 seconds, the hunter activates a circular scanner interface to survey the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy desert plains with massive aerial monster visible

events.description: weather warning text appears and massive flying monster emerges from the haze in the sky

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while observing the massive creature hovering in the storm clouds ahead

notable_agents.action: companion maintaining pace while looking toward the distant monster

entered.detail: massive dragon-like creature with wings hovering in the storm clouds

segments.scene_description: As the hunter continues through the sandy terrain, a weather warning appears and a gigantic flying monster becomes visible in the hazy sky. The creature hovers in the distance while the hunter and companion proceed forward, passing scattered trees and approaching larger rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky savanna with large stone towers and denser tree cover

events.description: flying monster disappears from view and terrain becomes rockier with more vegetation

agents.ego_description: navigating through increasingly vegetated terrain toward large rock towers

notable_agents.action: companion running ahead toward the trees

entered.detail: tall stacked rock pillars and formations rising from the ground
cluster of mature acacia trees with thick canopies

segments.scene_description: The massive monster fades from view as the hunter moves into a rockier area with large stone towers and denser acacia tree coverage. The companion runs ahead as they navigate through the increasingly complex terrain of the sandy savanna.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open desert savanna that gradually transitions into a rugged, rocky landscape. It begins with the hunter and a small feline companion walking past scattered acacia trees, during which the hunter activates a circular scanner to survey the horizon. As they proceed through the sandy terrain, the sky hazes over with a weather warning while a gigantic flying monster emerges and hovers in the distance. The scene then shifts as the monster fades from view and the terrain becomes increasingly complex, moving away from the open plains toward towering stone formations. Finally, the camera follows the companion running ahead through denser acacia coverage and large rock towers deep within the savanna.
